prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document specifically pertains to Look Ahead Care and Support Limited's operations in England, as it mentions local authority areas in London and the South East of England, and does not reference any aspects related to housing regulations or standards applicable to Scotland.
